title: Create: Creative
description: Adds creative item recipes to Create, I'm sorry.
body: **This mod is cursed, I don't know why you would download it and I only made it because someone asked me to.** **Create: Creative** Is an addon for Create which adds creative item recipes. **Content:** - Recipes for all Create mod's creative items ![Collection of recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0ab85da1bf374dd856c622f29e4a8d8e75ced33.png) **FAQ:** **Why?** I don't know, I'm sorry.
